## Type of Change

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for this change
- [ ] Ruff linter passes (`uv run ruff check .`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, docstrings) as needed
- [ ] I have added type annotations to public APIs
- [ ] I have considered security implications (no crypto weakening, no side channels)
- [ ] My changes maintain zero new external runtime dependencies (unless strongly justified)
